tracks.rawText: 2:19Brass Hearthstringv5.5Rustic folk-fantasy soundscape with fingerpicked acoustic guitar, tin whistle, low drones, bodhrán pulse, and warm fiddle doubles, Cozy modal melodies, hammered dulcimer accents, round choral harmonies, and earthy room reverb create a handmade village feel, with subtle dynamic lifts and a few Al Di Meola-inspired acoustic runs for added virtuoso sparkle2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Brass Hearthstring

tracks.rawText: 2:24Chalkstone Lullabyv5.5Rustic folk-fantasy soundscape with fingerpicked acoustic guitar, tin whistle, low drones, bodhrán pulse, and warm fiddle doubles, Cozy modal melodies, hammered dulcimer spark, round choral harmonies, and earthy room reverb evoke a bustling pastoral village with intimate, handmade textures and gentle dynamic lifts2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Chalkstone Lullaby

tracks.rawText: 2:07Barbed Accordionv5.5Fast-burning folk-fusion for la comarca at breakneck tempo, with frantic acoustic guitar strums, rapid hand percussion, punchy kick-snare accents, and fiddle runs racing over a driving bassline, Tight room reverb, clipped transients, and crowded call-and-response layers create a breathless, high-energy, rural dance pulse1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Barbed Accordion

tracks.rawText: 2:03Glass Choirv5.5Virtuosic angelic harp with rapid glissandos, rolled chords, and delicate harmonics over a glassy synthetic pad bed, Airy choir layers, celesta accents, and a soft sub-bass pulse create a luminous, high-register texture, Spacious reverb and subtle delay widen the arrangement into a radiant, floating dream1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 1:18Clavichord Staticv5.5Chamber music built around a Louis XV-era clavichord, intimate and dry, with delicate finger pressure articulation, subtle vibrato-like pitch inflection, and exposed room tone, Sparse viola da gamba and muted cello answer in contrapuntal lines; silence is used as rhythmic punctuation, with restrained harp harmonics and faint harpsichord accents in a refined neo-baroque texture2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Clavichord Static
